user_query: My friend lives in Mississauga, about an hour from downtown. What days are without any work commitments or flights?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 9 contains only restaurants and shopping/POI visits (brunch, Eaton Centre, boutiques, dinner) — no flights or work commitments listed.
Day 8 is a full-day Niagara Falls excursion and meals (tour bus + restaurants) — no flights or work commitments listed.
Day 7 lists museums, walking tours, and meals (ROM, Distillery District, restaurants) — no flights or work commitments listed.
